home.title: Agric-onchain Finance
home.subtitle: Blockchain-backed agricultural trade finance platform
home.description: Connect farmers, traders, and investors through tokenized agricultural trade deals on Stellar blockchain.
home.liveOnStellar: Live on Stellar Testnet · Zero fees during beta

features.title: Everything in one ecosystem
features.description: From seed funding to harvest sales — AgriFi handles the full agricultural value chain.

fundFarming.title: Fund Farming Projects
fundFarming.desc: Farmers tokenize crops and raise capital. Investors get fractional ownership with transparent on-chain returns.

realTime.title: Real-Time Tracking
realTime.desc: Live harvest updates, GPS shipment milestones, and immutable proof of every transaction on Stellar.

marketplace.title: Direct Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Companies buy verified agricultural products straight from farmers — zero middlemen, full traceability.

escrow.title: Stellar Escrow
escrow.desc: Smart escrow accounts, tokenized assets, and cryptographic proof secure every deal end-to-end.

step1.title: Create Account
step1.desc: Sign up as a farmer, investor, or company in under 2 minutes.

step2.title: Complete KYC
step2.desc: Verify your identity to unlock full platform access.

step3.title: Fund or List
step3.desc: Farmers list crops; investors browse and fund projects.

step4.title: Earn Returns
step4.desc: Track harvest, receive payouts, and reinvest profits.

transparency.title: Transparent by design
transparency.description: Every investment, payout, and milestone is recorded on Stellar. Verify anything, anytime.

smartContracts.title: Soroban Smart Contracts
smartContracts.desc: FarmCampaign contracts automate escrow, milestone releases, and revenue distribution — no manual intervention.

tokenized.title: Tokenized Investments
tokenized.desc: Each project issues Stellar assets. Investors hold tokens representing fractional ownership, tradeable on the DEX.

usdc.title: USDC Settlements
usdc.desc: All payments use USDC on Stellar — stable, fast, and cross-border. Withdraw to local currency via Stellar Anchors.

certificates.title: On-Chain Certificates
certificates.desc: Investment certificates are backed by immutable Stellar transactions. Proof of ownership, forever.

anchors.title: Stellar Anchors
anchors.desc: Deposit NGN, KES, GHS, ZAR or USD and receive USDC instantly. Withdraw earnings to your local bank.

audit.title: Public Audit Trail
audit.desc: Every contract address, transaction hash, and payout is publicly verifiable on Stellar Expert.

cta.title: Ready to grow your wealth?
cta.description: Join thousands of farmers, investors, and buyers already building the future of agriculture.

kyc.title: KYC verification required
kyc.desc: Complete KYC to publish deals and receive payments.

noProjects.title: No projects yet
noProjects.desc: List your first crop to start raising funding from investors worldwide.

instructions.title: Make sure to:
instructions.connectWallet: Connect your wallet in the top navigation

deals.tokenInfo: This will create {count} tokens at ${price} each.

validation.totalValueMin: Total value must be greater than 1000
validation.deliveryDateFuture: End date must be in the future
